meta.title: Yahya Dhaou — Full-Stack Developer
meta.description: Full-stack developer specialized in React, Next.js and React Native. Based in Essen, Germany.

hero.name: Yahya Dhaou
hero.tagline: I design and build fast, reliable web and mobile products — from pixel-perfect interfaces to the APIs and databases behind them.

about.title: Building products end to end, with care.
about.paragraph1: I'm a full-stack developer based in Essen, Germany, specialized in React, Next.js and React Native, with solid backend skills in Node.js and SQL / NoSQL databases. I like owning a feature from the Figma file all the way to the production database.
about.paragraph2: Over the past three years I've shipped a two-sided marketplace mobile platform, a freelance travel booking site, admin dashboards handling dozens of data entities, and 30+ reusable UI components used across projects.
about.paragraph3: Originally from Tunisia, I relocated to Germany in 2025 and reached German C1 — I now work comfortably in English, French and German.

values.title: Clean code
values.description: Maintainable, typed, and built to be read by the next person.

values.title: Performance
values.description: Lazy loading, memoization and code-splitting by default, not as an afterthought.

values.title: Full ownership
values.description: Comfortable across the stack — from UI polish to database schema design.

values.title: Continuous learning
values.description: Currently exploring Docker, Kubernetes and applied AI tooling.

skills.title: Tools I use to ship products

projects.title: Projects that shipped
projects.subtitle: A mix of product work and freelance delivery — mobile apps, dashboards and marketing sites.

glowupApp.title: GlowUp Beauty App
glowupApp.description: A two-sided beauty marketplace for the German market. Clients discover verified beauty professionals and book appointments in real time, while providers manage their schedule, clients and earnings from a companion app.
glowupApp.role: Full-stack — React Native (Expo) apps for client & provider, Node.js API, PostgreSQL

showcase.title: GlowUp — Product Showroom
showcase.description: Bilingual (DE/EN) investor & business showroom presenting the whole GlowUp ecosystem — market data, feature breakdowns and executive summaries for both the client app and the Pro studio app.

mhtravel.title: MhTravel
mhtravel.description: Responsive travel booking platform delivered as a freelance project for a travel agency in Tunisia, with dynamic content and booking flows on top of a Node.js / Express / MySQL backend.
mhtravel.role: Freelance — Next.js, React, Node.js, Express, MySQL

freelance.title: Freelance Full-Stack Developer
freelance.description: Led end-to-end development for a freelance travel agency platform (web & mobile), while building the GlowUp beauty platform on the side.

tunidesign.title: Full-Stack Developer
tunidesign.description: Built web and mobile solutions for a Tunisian legal-services platform. Created 30+ reusable UI components, cutting development time for follow-up projects by 35%.

croissantRouge.title: React Developer
croissantRouge.description: Volunteer work with the Tunisian Red Crescent dev team, maintaining and optimizing internal platforms and REST API integrations.

etafakna.title: Full-Stack Developer
etafakna.description: Built an interactive admin dashboard (React, MUI, Chart.js) with full CRUD across 16 data entities. Reduced SQL response times by ~40% and added Artillery load tests for critical endpoints.

contact.title: Let's build something great.
contact.subtitle: Open to full-time roles and freelance projects. I usually reply within a day.
contact.formSuccess: Thanks! Your message has been sent — I'll get back to you soon.
contact.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.
